description: Authenticate to LabArchives and list every notebook accessible to the user (notebook id, name, role). Read-only against the remote API. Reads credentials from a config.yaml (produce one with the setup-config perk).
rules: read-only remote — lists notebooks, mutates nothing
credentials are read from LA_CONFIG (a config.yaml)
needs the labarchives-py package + network; degrades to {} offline
usage: Set LA_CONFIG to a config.yaml path. Output: notebooks.json (the listing) + list_notebooks.json audit.
limitation: Requires the labarchives-py package, valid enterprise API credentials, and network access. When the package is absent the tool writes {} and exits 0 (graceful offline) so the contract still holds.
